summary:
PROPHETIC WARNINGS AND END TIME LEADERSHIP: Brandon shares that he received a message from the Lord identifying John Kilpatrick as a trustworthy major voice for the End Time Army. Brandon relays Kilpatrick's warnings about impending major earthquakes and volcanoes, specifically mentioning a significant event taking place in Oregon. He emphasizes that a worldwide shaking and shift are imminent, serving as a global wake-up call. Brandon points out that many people, including selfish preachers who fail to teach the meat of the Word, are willfully ignorant of the signs of the times, much like the scoffers predicted in biblical prophecy.

NATIONAL SECURITY AND POLITICAL WEAKNESS: Brandon highlights a severe vulnerability at the southern border, describing an influx of people, including those on terrorist watch lists. He references Nahum 3:13 to describe the United States' troops and leadership as weak and ineffective, specifically criticizing the Biden administration, the Secretary of Defense, and the Secretary of State. He foresees an invasion of tens of millions of people from all over the world attempting to cross the border in the coming year, warning that the country is in great peril due to this willful ignorance and lack of border control.

BIBLICAL PARALLELS OF SOCIETAL DECAY: Brandon draws parallels between modern America and the days of Noah and Lot. He details the story of Lot in Sodom and Gomorrah, focusing on Lot's narcissism, his compromise with wicked men, and his willful ignorance despite angelic warnings. Brandon compares the extreme sexual perversion, lawlessness, and violence of Sodom to current conditions in major American cities, particularly criticizing transgender teachings in schools. He describes visions of angels urgently waving for people to flee these corrupt, lawless cities before they are consumed by sin.

THE FOUR SINS CAUSING THE EARTH TO CONVULSE: Brandon explains the biblical principle that human sin directly impacts the land, causing it to convulse and vomit out its inhabitants. He outlines four specific sins driving this environmental reaction. The first is idolatry, comparing modern secularism to the worship of Baal in the days of Elijah. The second is immorality, including homosexuality and transgender issues, which he parallels with the days of Noah and Sodom. The third is the shedding of innocent blood, specifically referencing abortion in cities like New York and states like California, causing a mass exodus to places like Florida and Texas. The fourth is broken covenants, pointing to rising divorce rates and America's abandonment of its founding Judeo-Christian compacts, such as those made at Jamestown and by the Puritans.

ISRAEL COVENANT AND GLOBAL JUDGMENT: Brandon discusses God's everlasting covenant with Israel regarding their land from the Nile to the Euphrates. He condemns the October 7th attacks by Hamas as the shedding of innocent blood and warns of divine retribution. He also references the Ezekiel prophecies involving Russia, Iran, and a coalition of nations attacking Israel, which will trigger God's wrath and a massive earthquake. Furthermore, he describes a future worldwide earthquake prophesied in the Book of Revelation that will destroy cities, mountains, and islands once the church is removed.

PROPHETIC WARNING FOR ITALY: Brandon recounts a specific open-eyed vision regarding Italy. He describes seeing a massive, devastating volcano erupting on a coastline or in the ocean near Italy. He notes that there will be signs preceding this massive explosion and warns that this aquatic volcanic event will cause severe devastation.
rawData: [December 22, 2023]-[Prophetic confirmations and similarities that are coming - ft John Kilpatrick]-[https://youtu.be/VoC0PUzQups]-[Good morning, family. I am excited to be with you all again today. I have a word for you. I was praying and seeking the Lord one night, and about 3:00 AM, the Lord came to me very loudly in my spirit and said, 'Brandon, you are asking Me about who the major leaders in the End Time Army will be.' As I was praying about this, He said, 'John Kilpatrick will be one of the major voices in the End Time Army that you can trust and listen to.' This was what the Lord spoke to me, so I check in on his ministry every once in a while and listen to see what is going on. One of my family members sent me a video that he did a couple of Sundays ago about a word that the Lord gave him in the middle of the night. I am putting it all on here to show you that the Lord gave him a warning, telling him about major earthquakes and volcanoes that were going to start to take place. I believe what he was seeing was for the United States. I am telling you all, I saw a major event taking place; as he pointed out, what the Lord showed him is in Oregon. I do not want to go on until you can watch it. I want to tell you all this: it is amazing to see when God speaks to people who are prophetic. It is like a mirror; it is different, but it is the same because it is the same Spirit of the Lord. He speaks to each one of us differently in the way we interpret it, and I think it is amazing. I want to encourage you all to watch this whole thing. This is a prophetic message for today—a warning for what is coming. A major shift and a major shaking are about to take place in this world, and it is not just about America; it is about a worldwide wake-up. Jesus Christ is coming, and you better be ready. If you are not saved, today is your day. You need to get born again, turn, and repent of your sins, for Jesus Christ is coming. I want to encourage you all to please watch this whole thing; it will bless you. This sermon is amazing, and I hope it blesses you. Knowing this first: there shall come in the last days scoffers, walking after their own lusts and saying, 'Where is the promise of His coming? For since the fathers fell asleep—the ones who used to be alive and told us the Lord was coming—He hasn't come.' All things continue as they were from the beginning of creation without missing a lick. The Bible says that they are willingly ignorant. They have made up their minds that no matter what they see, they are going to be untouched by it. They have made up their minds that no matter what sign is taking place in the world on their televisions and before their very eyes, they are not going to believe. They have a blindfold on; they are willfully ignorant of the word of the Lord. The heavens were of old and the Earth standing out of the water and in the water. It says two things: 'willingly ignorant.' Not just ignorant, but willingly ignorant. They won't let it penetrate them, won't think on it, won't tell their children, and won't discuss it with their spouse. Pastors won't preach it to their congregations; they willingly stick their head in the sand or put a blindfold on and say, 'No, it's nothing important.' I saw preachers standing behind the pulpit, and they had oil—this smooth-looking oil—all over their mouths, and it was dripping from their lips. They had roaches and bugs crawling in and out of their mouths and laying upon their lips. They were crawling in their teeth, and the bugs were crawling in and out of their mouths as they spoke. They had a sheen in their eyes; their motives behind what they were preaching were all selfish gain, trying to appease the ears of the people. Then I saw the ears of the people, and I could see their ears were being pacified by all these whispers of the things that were happening in the spirit. 'Everything is going to be good; all things are going to work for your good for those who love the Lord.' They were speaking the Word, but they were not speaking what was on God's heart. They were speaking things, but they weren't speaking things to make you grow. I saw those bugs coming out of their teeth and mouths, and the Lord spoke to me and said, 'Brandon, the preachers are not teaching the meat of the Word to grow My children up into adult stature.' And those who are on terrorist watch lists are crossing into our country now every day, many times a day. I know that many people coming across our borders are desperate for a new life and a new start, and I understand that. I really do. I feel sorry for many of them; they are poor, they cannot get healthcare, and they dream of coming to America. I can understand they are willing to pay any price to get here, even if it means coming in illegally, and my heart goes out to them. But there are many others who have an evil intent to destroy our country and our way of life. I want to show you a scripture; it is found in Nahum 3:13. I am going to read it in the King James first, and then I am going to read it in the NIV and the New Living Translation. Here is the King James: 'Behold, thy people in the midst of thee are women: the gates of thy land shall be set wide open unto thine enemies.' In Nahum 3:13 (NIV), it says: 'Look at your troops—they are all weaklings. The gates of your land are wide open to your enemies.' But this one really gets me—the New Living Translation: 'Your troops will be as weak and helpless as women. The gates of your land will be opened wide to the enemy.' That is the southern border. I have heard so much talk about the southern border and how this is not happening. This presidential candidate said, 'I am going to build a wall and we are going to keep them out.' Another president gets elected and he opens them up, and anyone can come. It is sickening—it is sickening. It is like there is no care anymore. We do not care who comes in. We do not care if they have bombs. We do not care if a hundred of them come in and they all have parts to a nuclear bomb; they will build it and try to have a limited nuclear weapon explode somewhere in this country. If that happens, I hate to say it, but we deserve it because we have thrown all caution to the wind. Ladies and gentlemen, our country is in great peril, and I think it is time someone stands up and says it. Let me read this to you again in the New Living Translation: 'Your troops will be as weak and helpless as women.' In other words, the troops will be completely ineffective. The gates of your land open wide to the enemy. Open wide to whom? To people wanting a better life? No, open wide to the enemy. You see, what happens when you put a blindfold on is the enemy is coming in, and you do not even care anymore. Listen: you sow to the wind, you will reap the whirlwind. Now I want to show you this scripture in Nahum. This is interesting; I think this sums up the Biden administration as well as any scripture I have ever read: 'Behold, I am against thee,' saith the Lord of hosts; 'I will discover thy skirts upon thy face; I will show the nations thy nakedness, and the kingdoms thy shame.' In the NIV it says: 'I am against you,' declares the Lord Almighty. 'I will lift your skirts over your face; I will show the nations your nakedness and the kingdoms your shame.' The kingdoms of this world are seeing how weak our president is and how weak his administration is—from the Secretary of Defense to the Secretary of State to the president himself. Weak, weak, weak, weak. America is in peril, and unless something happens pretty quickly, America is going to be in great peril. I saw tens of millions of people coming from the Mexican border—the southern border—trying to invade America over the next year. But it wasn't all people from Mexico. They were from all over the world. I literally saw millions of people coming—millions—so much that whenever you're in a crowd at a football field or a big concert, they're stacked upon stacked, all in lines. It's like a sea of people coming across trying to come across the border, but that was like all at once, all trying to come at once, and there was nothing they could do. There were so many people seeking God for revival because, as well as I do now, revival is the only thing that will make a difference in America. It's the only thing. Revival is the cure of all ills. We need the government to be on the shoulders of Jesus Christ. That's what we need. Come on, somebody help me! I said we need the government to be on his shoulders. Can you shout, 'Amen'? The only thing that's going to save America is an awakening unto God. That's the only thing that's ever going to save us is Jesus Christ and preaching him crucified and what he did on that cross for you. We need to get born again, we need to get on fire for the Lord, and you start being the salt of the earth and teaching people the word of God. That's what's going to change a nation, not politics. Politicians are just human. Jesus said this in Luke 17: 'As it was in the days of Noah, so will it be also in the days of the Son of Man. They ate and they drank, they married wives, and they were given in marriage until the day that Noah entered the ark, and the flood came and destroyed everybody.' Likewise, Jesus mentions this; he said, 'I want to bring to your attention, likewise it was also as it was in the days of Lot. They ate and they drank, they bought, they sold, they planted, they built. But on the day that Lot went out of Sodom, it rained fire and brimstone from heaven and destroyed them all. Even so it will be in the day when the Son of Man is revealed.' Jesus said this. Now, this came out of the mouth of Jesus. This is why they didn't like Jesus, because Jesus was a truth-teller. He wasn't trying to make nobody mad; he was just saying, 'I'm a watchman on the wall and I see something I think you need to know.' And he said, 'As you read about these stories in your scriptures, read and understand: in the last days, it's going to be just like this, like it was in the days of Noah and in the days of Lot.' He said, 'As it was in that day, it will be in the day when the son of man is revealed.' And then he said, 'Remember this: remember Lot's wife.' Now I'm going to talk about these in just a minute. So Abram, in chapter 13 of Genesis, said to Lot, 'Let there be no strife, son, I pray, between me and you and between my herdsmen and your herdsmen, for we're brethren. Is not the whole land before you? Separate yourself, I pray, from me. If you'll take the left, I'll go to the right. If you don't go to the right, I'll go to the left.' And Lot lifted up his eyes. He was a narcissist. He wanted what was best for him, not what was best for his respectable and honorable uncle Abraham. But a narcissist wants what's best for them. Could I say this before I go any further? That's what's wrong today with leadership in America. Just about every one of them is a narcissist. Could I say that one more time? What's wrong today is the people on subcommittees; they're more interested in that camera being on them and them so-called pinning a witness down so that they can look good. But their people at home are more concerned about looking good to the people at home than they are trying to find the truth. He said Lot lifted up his eyes and behold the plain of Jordan; it was well-watered everywhere before the Lord destroyed Sodom and Gomorrah, even as the garden of the Lord, which was like Eden. It was beautiful, like the land of Egypt, all the way down to a place called Zoar. And Lot chose him the plain of Jordan and Lot journeyed east, and they separated from each other. Abram dwelt in the land of Canaan, and Lot dwelt in the cities of the plain and pitched his tent toward Sodom. Big mistake. But the men of Sodom were wicked and sinners before the Lord exceedingly. There came a day in chapter 19, verses 1 through 4—I'm going to read this, I can read it better; the word says it better than I can preach it—there came two angels to Sodom at evening, and Lot sat at the gates of Sodom. And Lot saw these angels and rose up to meet them, and he bowed himself with his face toward the ground. He recognized them as angels, and he said, 'Behold now, my lords, turn in, I pray you, into my house and tarry all night. Wash your feet, and you shall rise up early and go on your ways.' And they said, 'No, we would rather abide here in the streets.' And he pressed upon them greatly, and they turned in unto him and entered into his house, and he made them a feast and did bake unleavened bread, and they did eat. Now these angels ate; they were not just spirit beings, ethereal, but they were nebulous—they could digest food, they could eat food. And they went to Lot's house and they ate a feast of unleavened bread. Now before they laid down that night, the men of the city, even the men of Sodom, compassed Lot's house roundabout, both old men and young men, and all people from all quarters. And they called unto Lot and they said, 'Hey Lot, where's those men that came to you this night? Bring them out that we may know them,' or bring them out that we may have relations with them. Lot went out to the door unto them and shut the door after him. The reason he shut the door after him is he didn't want those angels to hear him negotiating with these evil men, because once you ever go to the devil's negotiating table, you're not going to get away until you give something up. And notice what he said: he called them 'brethren.' He said, 'Brethren, don't do so wickedly.' What did you call them? Brethren? Lot, do you know who you are? Do you know that your uncle is Abraham? Have you forgotten that your uncle is called the friend of God? And you're out here dealing with these wicked, evil sodomites and you're calling them brethren? Well, where does that put you? And it gets more interesting. Listen to this. He said, 'I've got two daughters.' Well, I have a question: reckon how those daughters felt about that time? He closed the door behind him; he didn't want those angels to hear him negotiating with these evil men. He said, 'I've got two daughters which have never known a man; they're virgins. Let me bring them out to you and you do good to them as you see in your eyes, but to these men don't touch them, for therefore they came under the shadow of my roof.' You know what this is? Lot did this—yes—willfully ignorant. 'I'll give you my daughters. I don't care what you do to them.' In other words, 'I'm willing to put my daughters on the negotiating table. Don't touch the angels, but you can have my daughters.' Well, what does that mean? First of all, the angels are well able to take care of themselves. Amen! They're well able to take care of themselves. As a matter of fact, they're going to see within 24 hours he'll take care of everybody in that whole double twin city, Sodom and Gomorrah. But he offered his daughters—willfully ignorant. What are you talking about, man? Your uncle is Abraham! Have you forgotten who you are? Have you forgotten that Abraham is the friend of God? God said he's his friend, and you're out there talking about these people and you're negotiating with these people and willing to give Uncle Abraham's great-nieces to these men to have their way with them? You see what I'm talking about? Sin will make a literal fool out of you. And they said, 'Stand back!' And they said again, 'This one fellow came in to sojourn and he needs be a judge. Now we'll deal worse with you than with them.' And they pressed sore upon the man, even Lot, and they came to break the door down. Such a strong spirit of lust was loose in those cities; it was permeating the atmosphere of those twin cities, Sodom and Gomorrah. And these men were burning under that strong spirit of lust, and they came to break the door down because Lot would not present those men to them. They were going to come in, break the door down, and get them and rape them. And the Bible says the angels put forth their hand, pulled Lot into the house to them, and shut the door. And they smote the men that were at the door of the house with blindness, both small and great, so that they wearied themselves to find the door. Now, I have something I'd like to say: if I was one of those men of Sodom and there were two men in there that I was interested in, and I saw that they had the power to do that, I'd just say, 'I'm going to the house. I don't want nothing to do with that.' But they had the power to blind those men. The Bible said there was a bunch of them—they surrounded the house, they were violent, they were ready to break down the door—there was a bunch of them. But the angels could well take care of themselves, and they blinded those men and they went groping off in the dark. And so here's what it says: the men said to Lot, 'Is there anybody else here besides your daughters and sons-in-law and your sons and whatever you have in the city? Bring them out of this place.' In other words, it was a state of emergency. Now, when the angels really saw that it was a state of emergency, the angels said, 'Is there anybody else here besides your daughters and sons-in-law and your sons and whatever you have in this city? Go get it and bring it out of this place. We're going to destroy this place.' They said it: 'We're going to destroy this place because the cry of this sin is waxed great before the face of the Lord, and the Lord has sent us to destroy it.' God didn't destroy Sodom and Gomorrah; the angels had been authorized, delegated authority to destroy Sodom and Gomorrah. The angels did. Two angels. And so the Bible said Lot went out and spoke to his sons-in-law that married his daughters and said, 'Up! Let's get out of here. God is going to destroy this city.' But look at this now; everybody look at me and listen to me carefully. The Bible said when he told his sons-in-law that it was such a state of emergency, they were willfully ignorant because they saw what happened. Could I tell you right now we're living in one of the most crucial times America has ever gone through, and most of the American people have blinders on? They don't want to see it, they don't want to hear it. People in churches don't want to hear it and they don't want to see it. We just want some good singing, and we want to love our little pastor, and we just want to have us a nice little church, but they don't want to hear what the watchman on the wall has to say anymore. Are you listening to me? I think most of my ministry is behind me—I've been in this thing 53 years—so I've got nothing to prove. If you're thinking that I'm going to get worried that you're not going to like me, friend, think again. It's not going to bother me if you like me or you don't like me. What I'm trying to say is this: if I hear something that you need to hear, I'm going to tell you, and I'm not going to back up from telling you. So there was major blindness. But the Bible said in the morning, those angels told Lot, 'Get your family out of here. Evacuate your house, y'all evacuate Sodom and Gomorrah. Get all that you've got. Get out, hurry, get out!' They said, 'Tomorrow morning we're going to destroy these cities.' So it said in the morning, they arose and the angels hastened Lot. The angels stayed there with them all night, and the angels hastened Lot—that means they came with a state of emergency—'Lot, arise, get up, get your wife up, get your daughters up which are here, lest you be consumed with the sins of this city.' Are you hearing what that said? "Lest you be consumed with the sins of the city." There's sins right now in major cities in America that if people don't learn to wake up and get out of some of these cities, the sins of those cities are going to consume many of these people. I'm telling you, I don't mind telling you: it's time. There comes a time to come, and there comes a time to go. You need to flee for your life! I want to show you what I'm talking about. That may sound like a radical statement, but I want to tell you what I'm talking about. I wonder if the day's going to come in America, before Jesus comes, that cities are going to become so lawless, and you're going to have such district attorneys that won't prosecute felons, and there's going to be lawlessness on every hand—robbery, murder, all these things—and people are still living there with blindfolds on. But there's preachers like me that God's raising up, and others that God's raising up, and He may be saying, "Think about getting out while you can. This place is becoming a Sodom and a Gomorrah. Get out while you can!" Some of you, when you heard me say that, you might put the brakes on and say, "Oh, now he's beginning to get a little bit fanatical." No, I want you to listen to what I'm saying. I'm telling you right now, you better pray for many of your relatives that live in some of these large cities. The devil is trying to consume these cities, and he's trying to consume the Christian; he's trying to gobble up the churches. When is the last time you've ever heard of a powerful Holy Ghost-filled church in some of these big cities? They're being gobbled up and spit out. Be careful, friend, that you don't stay too long in Sodom. Oh my God, I said be careful that you don't tarry too long in Sodom. Get out while the getting is good! Listen, it said, "while he lingered." While he what? While he lingered. If I've got an angel over here telling me to get out, I'm going to say, "Okay," you know? But while he lingered—you know what that was? You got it: willful ignorance. Now listen to this: the angels laid hold on his hand. Look at this, the angels laid hold on his hand. An angel touched him. If you're in a stupor, I would think that if an angel touched me, I'd say, "Whoa, thank you very much!" An angel talked to him, an angel warned him, and now an angel reached out and grabbed hold of him. Wow! And look what he said: laid hold of his hand and the hand of his wife. God was showing mercy. They evacuated them out of the city marked for destruction. And so now the angel said, "Let us give you our plan of where to go. Now that we got you out of the city, we want to tell you the best route." So when they had brought them forth abroad, the angel said, "Escape for your life! Now look not behind you. Don't stay in all the plain. Get out of the plain. Escape to the mountain, lest you be consumed." I brought you out of the city, I took you by the hand, I warned you, I can't do anything else. We've got to go back and destroy these cities, but now keep going. Escape to the mountain; don't stay in these plains, lest you be consumed. You're going to stay? You're going to be too close. There's going to be a terrible fire and brimstone; you don't want to stay here. Keep moving, keep moving fast! And Lot said, "Oh no, no, not so, my Lord! If I have found grace in your sight, and you have magnified Thy mercy which you showed unto me in saving my life, I can't escape to the mountain. What? I can't escape to the mountain, lest some evil would overtake me and I die." I think if I'd been that angel, I'd give a swift kick in his rear end. I think I'd have kicked him so hard I would have knocked him past the Milky Way! "I can't, lest some wild animal kills me." You know what the angel should have said? "Oh, you're going to die? We can arrange that if you just stay here in the plains! You're going to die, but I'm telling you, go to the mountains; that's the safest route." How many of you know if an angel's talking to me, I'm going where the angel tells me to go? But he became willfully ignorant—willfully ignorant. He heard it, but he rejected the information. Look at this: "I can't escape to the mountain, lest some evil take me and I die. Behold now, this city is near to flee into; it's just a little city. Let me escape to this city. Is it not a little city? And my soul shall live." So Lot hesitated and challenged the directions that the angels chose to give him and his family, and he said, "There's wild animals there; I may die." See what happens whenever you're in a place where there's major sin? You lose your reasoning abilities. Understand that when you're in a place where there's prolific sin, and where there are abominable sins that are really strong in that city, it affects people's thinking. And there's no doubt in my mind but what's going on in America today; there's such abominable sins taking place that it's even affecting the logic and the reasoning of many normal people. They're not even thinking normal anymore. They're not thinking about how great God is; they're not thinking about how thankful they ought to be that God sent the angels. They're thinking about wild animals, wild animals. And listen to this: so the Bible says Lot plotted his own escape route and chose a little city called Zoar. And the angel said, "Well, hurry." So as the sun came up that morning on the earth, Lot entered into Zoar. He didn't do what the angels told him; he didn't go to the mountains. He went where he wanted to go. He was not open for instruction. You know what I'm seeing today? I'm seeing many good people that used to be close to God and love God—I'm seeing many of them now where they don't take instructions anymore from men of God, women of God, and including the Word of God. They're choosing what's right in their own sight. Are y'all listening to what I'm saying? I said, are you listening to what I'm saying? You know I'm telling you the truth. Now listen to this: when the sun came up on the earth, Lot was entering into Zoar. He got his way. God wouldn't wait another minute; He told those angels, "Let it go." It rained down fire and brimstone, and all the inhabitants perished. Now, this is so strange to me. Abraham interceded for Lot, but Abraham also interceded for Sodom and Gomorrah. But have you ever thought about this? That city was so wicked that Abraham stopped interceding at ten, and he said surely He won't do it because there's surely ten righteous there. Well, Lot was considered righteous. Lot escaped by the skin of his teeth, only because of his uncle Abraham. That culture of Sodom and Gomorrah had worked its way into the very pores of the fiber of their souls that when the angel said, "Don't turn and look back," Lot's wife turned like this and looked back. Her feet were facing Zoar, but her head was facing Sodom, and she froze and became a pillar of salt. And God rained down fire and brimstone on Sodom and Gomorrah, and the land was burned to a crisp, and to this day, nothing grows there. God destroyed it. Suppose there's people in America today that are living in hellholes a lot like that, cities with names of cities that we all know. How much longer can you stay there? I'm asking you this question: how much longer can you stay there? How much longer can you stay where Law and Order is out the door? How much longer can you stay where sodomites are teaching your kids in the school system? Sodomites are behind the teacher's desk where your kids put an apple on that desk, and they're teaching them sexual things, and they're teaching them, "You might not really be a male; you might not really be a female." And if you're beginning to wonder about that, "I can help you." I think not! You better not try to help my child; you better not try to—I'll take care of my child. But I'd just like to ask this question: how much longer can you stay in a city like that with ungodly leadership, darkness—prevalent darkness? People have got their eyes covered over, willful ignorance, and your kids are being taught like that on every hand. Listen, on every hand, wickedness is taking over some of our major cities. The Lord warned me about the winter and about the blue states. It wasn't more about the red states, and I saw more of people moving and relocating—the Lord warning them to relocate and to start moving and doing things over 2024, going into 2025. Those angels were coming down, and they were going to these homes, and they were doing this motion with their hand, doing like this, like, "Come on, come on, come on," telling the people to leave. "Come on, come on," warning the people. Somehow it was very strange because every angel was doing the motion with their hand; they were waving the people to come on. And so they did this for probably several minutes. When you're in the spirit, you know, I couldn't really tell a time frame; you could just sense an urgency on their faces. I could see their faces, and it felt such an urgency of a warning, telling the people to, "Come, come, leave, leave." You know, that's what I felt. They didn't say anything; I could just see the body language, that they were in a hurry. I'm coming to you with this message about "The Earth is Speaking: Are You Listening?" I'm dealing with four major sins that will cause the Earth to convulse. And if you look in the Bible, you'll see that man and land are indelibly connected. The land will manifest what's going on with the man. When God put Adam in the garden, He put him there to tend the land, and the land and Adam worked together, and it was a beautiful thing. But when man sinned, the land began to rebel against man, and the land began to manifest what was going on in man.
